title: Stripe Webhook Handler
description: Build a webhook handler that receives POST /webhook/stripe from Stripe. Payload has { type: 'payment.succeeded', amount: 4500, customer_email: 'x@y.com' }. Verify the signature (for this test, just check that a 'signature' field exists on the request). Save the event to an Events table with type, amount, email, and received_at. Return { received: true }.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Events table:
  event_type, required
  amount (number), default 0
  customer_email
  received_at_date, auto

# Your webhook endpoint here — single POST /webhook/stripe that saves the event
